case_title: TOMAS PENA VS. JULIA PERALTA et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PENA, TOMAS DBA LATIN JEWELERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PERALTA, JULIA VELIZ, RICARDO $1,382.88 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,457.88, DEFENDANTS JULIA PERALTA AND RICARDO VELIZ ARE NOT PRESENT.
